caption: In an indoor basketball gym featuring blue tiered seating and a court with a blue center area and wooden perimeter, a person wearing a pink sleeveless shirt and dark shorts is attempting a dunk. Initially, the person is seen running toward the basket while a basketball is in the air above them. As the sequence progresses, the person jumps high into the air, reaching the rim and slamming the ball through the hoop. Following the dunk, the person descends back toward the court floor, landing with their feet on the blue surface. The scene remains consistent in its setting, focusing on the athlete's movement from the approach to the peak of the jump and the eventual landing. No on-screen text or logos are visible throughout the sequence.
